name: GLADSTONE LAND Corp
summary: PART I Overview We are an externally-managed, agricultural real estate investment trust (REIT) that is primarily in the business of owning and leasing farmland, including through lease structures with a variable rent component based on the gross revenues generated from certain farms in lieu of fixed base rent. We are not generally a grower of crops, nor do we typically farm the properties we own, though from time to time, and on a temporary basis, we may also directly operate certain of our farm...
